title: rubus selectus
intro: Rubus selectus, also known as the wild raspberry, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus selectus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. Rubus selectus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in jams and preserves due to its sweet and flavorful fruit.
